title: August 7th, 2021 (2)
body:
- wheel of needs diagram
- wheel of feelings diagram
- kickitty kat
- if you f[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] on my head, i'll eat your f[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] then f[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] on your neck so you can't eat my f[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] but you have to smell it
- how am i going to rehome my [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] so i can foster more
- i feel like beyonce trying to dress the lol dolls. if you don't gotta jump to get in your jeans
- the cool school pool tool rules
- david bowie, we could be heroes, ziggy stardust
- noble aquemini moreno instantly zeroed in on two older girls at cenote, maybe 9 and 12. stared at them for a minute. said she wanted her shoes back on. then followed them into the bathroom
- fight the monster every step
- you'll be a ghoul if you fight this monster
- but you'll die if you don't
- which choice is yours
- led zeppelin
- spatial awareness in human traffic
- boxtacle
- table objects memory game
- queen lover boy

- when i move photos here, i can delete them from google photos. when google photos is empty i can delete it. i'll need to find another way to share pictures of noble aquemini moreno. i can unhook google photos from new uploads now
- optimize pc st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]up software
- i'm moving forward through crisis, not back through my sense of what was supposed to be
- what else can i optimize or automate
- week of august 24 works better for kyle
- find discord communities
- make infrastructure improvements as soon as they are discovered
- stop and consider infrastructure whenever thoughts of it arise
- set computer to turn on at 10 am with correct st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]up pages, spotify of my music, and an [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] slideshow
- rechargeable aa's
- a wrinkle in time series
- i get confused when someone wants in situ answers from me to ex situ questions
- downloading autoit. seems like a useful tool to learn. gonna st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] with automating spotify scheduled st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]up behavior
    - too big a hump to deviate to right now, given my uninformedness. the bane of all infrastructure
